_note: Teaching fixture. Shape `intent release ./intent --mvp` is PLANNED to emit. Hand-authored to illustrate MVP Readiness. It deliberately does NOT claim production readiness.

overall.reason: Billing is the weakest area and gates the MVP: the paid path is under-verified and ActivateSubscription is not yet authored. Identity and Onboarding are further along, but the whole MVP is only as shippable as its weakest journey.

blockers: AuditLog, ErrorMonitoring, RollbackPlan not yet authored

blockersToNextLevel: Verify CreateCheckoutSession (raise 1/5 to full) to move Billing off demo_safe.
Author ActivateSubscription to complete the Subscription Billing chain.
Finish InviteTeamMember tests to firm up the Signup chain.
Author AuditLog, ErrorMonitoring, and RollbackPlan for deployment readiness.
teaching: MVP Readiness lets a team ship a demo honestly without pretending it is production. Each level names the exact missions that hold it back.
